response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video for vocal musical performances. The video is a promotional announcement and conversational clip. While background music is present, no songs are being performed/sung by the characters. Therefore, no vocal music was detected, and no lyric searches were conducted.
response.global_summary: An announcement video featuring members of the VTuber group Secret Society holoX discussing their collaboration with the Monogatari Series and the announcement of their first album, 'Secret ORDER'. The video consists of dialogue and promotional graphics; there is no vocal musical performance by the characters.

scenes.description: Opening text sequence announcing the collaboration between Monogatari Series and Secret Society holoX.
The members of holoX appear on screen reacting to the collaboration announcement.
The characters discuss the details and excitement regarding the collaboration project.
The characters discuss the upcoming 'Secret ORDER' album release.
Final closing remarks and excitement about the project.
